channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Parking restriction sign has been graffitied over o/s no. 1, 8th April
item.description:
Parking restriction sign has been graffitied over so unable to read restrictions

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 42, Southampton Way, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Van parked illegally, 8th April
item.description:
Van has been parked illegally for two days. Possibly abandoned?

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Albion Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree branches beginning to over hang onto property, 8th April
item.description:
I am writing to raise a concern about a tree located near my property that has been causing ongoing issues, particularly during the summer months. Each year, the tree’s dense foliage significantly blocks sunlight from reaching my garden, which makes it difficult to maintain healthy grass and plants. In addition, the tree’s roots appear to be spreading into my garden and have caused a noticeable dip in the middle of the lawn, creating an uneven surface. More recently, the branches have started to extend and hang over my property, which is becoming an increasing concern. I would be grateful if the council could assess the situation and advise on whether any action, such as pruning or root management, could be taken to help resolve these issues. Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to your response.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 91, Old Farm Avenue, Longlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on every shuttered, 8th April
item.description:
Katy on Evri shutter on 69 to 71 upper ground or Broadwell not quite sure which address is which
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 69,71, Upper Ground, Southwark, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large yellow couch deposited here, 8th April
item.description:
The couch has been fly tipped in the bin area of the site we manage.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Shore Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Parked on footway to cause maximum obstruction for visually impaired resident, 8th April
item.description:
Number is in photograph

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 43, Sandringham Road, Shacklewell, Greater London

Months. Council does nothing

item.title: Abandoned Ambulance, 8th April
item.description:
This ambulance has been at the end of Halt Robin Road for just over a week.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Halt Robin Road, Lower Belvedere, Greater London

item.title: Rubbish left and blocking pavement, 8th April
item.description:
A mattress and cement bag has been left out on pavement and is a hazard blocking path

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lansdowne Drive, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Entirety of Peckham park road is uneven and full of holes, 8th April
item.description:
Just as Peckham hill street and commercial way have recently been refilled, Peckham Park Road from the old Kent road junction all the way down to the commercial way junction should be repaved. The road is uneven, full of holes and gravel, the speed bumps hinder any smooth transition from the difficult road. The issue has been present for at least two year.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Peckham Park Road, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Parked dangerously on a steep hill, 8th April
item.description:
Van has been parked for a week on a very steep road and dangerously protrudes into most of the lane making it difficult to pass, especially when it's close to a T-Junction and blind corner

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Nithdale Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 8th April
item.description:
Divan bed and other detritus has been added to the pile

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brampton Road, Bexleyheath
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Heaps of rubbish at private HMO, 8th April
item.description:
Piles of rubbish have been accumulating in the front garden and on sidewalk of 38 Dunlace, a private HMO. This is attracting animals, causing an odour, and trash is blowing into neighbor’s front gardens. Tenants are unable or unwilling to clear up.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Dunlace Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside charity shop LHS pavement near lights, 8th April
item.description:
Cracked & uneven paving stones caused my serious fall 7/4/26 yesterday. Police took me to a&e. I have fractured my upper arm humerus and bruised my face. 4-6 weeks to recover.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 229a, Camden Road, Holloway, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter on street, 8th April
item.description:
Someone is regularly leaving their litter on my property. Has happened a few times over the last few weeks

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Allen Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Road marking issue, 8th April
item.description:
Road marking issue coming from bugsby way Charlton side to Blackwall way Whe turning left there are 3 lanes and road marking barely visible Chance of accident all the time
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bugsbys Way, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Poor Repairs, 8th April
item.description:
The footpath maintenance/repair is of a very poor quality. How does RBG accept this quality repair from its contractors? I attempt us made to maintain the original material and appearance and results in a patchwork of repairs that makes the area look neglected

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Ridge Close, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Offensive graffiti on wall, 8th April
item.description:
This graffiti hints at a terrorist organisation, either promoting what they do or hinting that the organisation operates from the street the tag has been seen. This hugely offensive in the current climate and could stir violence in the borough.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Clarence Mews, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Victoria road x victoria mews, 8th April
item.description:
Bagged waste at corner if victoria road and mews

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Victoria Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag
